subject: [PATCH v3 07/10] nfsd: return NFS4ERR_NOTSUPP for unsupported netloc4 types

2026-07-10.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFS server where it incorrectly returns an error for unsupported network location types (NL4_NAME and NL4_URL). Instead of returning a misleading 'bad XDR' error, the patch correctly identifies these types as unsupported and returns the 'not supported' error. This ensures that the stream remains consistent by decoding and discarding any associated UTF-8 strings.
